articles.description: Body camera footage showing Tiger Woods straight after he clipped a truck and rolled his car in Florida last month is released by police.
articles.title: Tiger Woods: Police release body camera footage of golfer straight after Florida crash

articles.description: New Tottenham boss Roberto De Zerbi apologises to fans over comments he made about Mason Greenwood.
articles.title: Roberto de Zerbi apologises to Spurs fans over Greenwood comments

articles.description: Barcelona thrashed Real Madrid 6-0 at the Nou Camp to complete a 12-2 aggregate victory in the quarter-finals of the Champions League.
articles.title: Barcelona 6-0 Real Madrid: Barca through in Women's Champions League, will face Bayern Munich next

articles.description: The first open sale of tickets for the 2026 World Cup showed Fifa is charging up to  $10,990 (£8,333) to be at the final.
articles.title: World Cup tickets: $11,000 tickets put on sale for final

articles.description: Gerywn Price secures victory in Manchester after Gian van Veen accuses Luke Littler of being "out of order" on night nine of the Premier League.
articles.title: Premier League Darts 2026 results: Luke Littler and Gian van Veen clash as Gerwyn Price wins in Manchester

articles.description: Gabriele Gravina resigns as the head of the Italian Football Federation following the national side's failure to to qualify for a third consecutive World Cup.
articles.title: Italy 2026 World Cup: Gabriele Gravina resigns as head of the Italian Football Federation

articles.description: France wing Louis Bielle-Biarrey wins the Player of the Championship award for the 2026 Men's Six Nations.
articles.title: Six Nations: France star Louis Bielle-Biarrey wins 2026 Player of Championship award

articles.description: RB Leipzig slap £87m price tag on Yan Diomande, Saudi Pro League stepping up pursuit of Mohamed Salah, Everton growing confident Jack Grealish will be at the club next season, plus more.
articles.title: Football gossip: Salah, Guardiola, Diomande, Anderson, Wharton, Tonali, Valdepenas, Silva, Iraola,

articles.description: Three-time champion Phil Mickelson will miss this year's Masters and step away from golf "for an extended period of time" because of a family health matter, the American says.
articles.title: Phil Mickelson to miss Masters & take extended break from golf over family health matter

articles.description: NFL teams splashed out billions in free agency, but what were the biggest moves and who were the biggest spenders? BBC Sport takes a look.
articles.title: NFL free agency 2026: What were the biggest deals & biggest spending teams?
